overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural village at golden hour. The character travels from open countryside along a riverside path, through the village center with market stalls and NPCs, and finally enters a wooden house. The scene features traditional thatched-roof architecture and warm sunset lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward the village in the distance

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with grass growing on edges
rustic wooden post fence lining the path
traditional wooden houses with straw thatched roofs in the distance
tall grass and wild vegetation surrounding the path
evergreen trees lining the left side of the field

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rural dirt path surrounded by grass fields and pine trees. Geralt walks steadily toward a distant village with thatched-roof buildings visible on the horizon. A wooden fence runs along the right side of the path as the camera follows from behind.

events.description: transitions from open countryside to riverside stone path with retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated stone path beside the water, approaching village outskirts

entered.detail: cobblestone walkway with stone edging
low stone wall separating path from water
calm water reflecting the golden hour sky
elevated wooden guard tower with thatched roof

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a stone walkway running alongside a river, bordered by a stone retaining wall. A wooden watchtower stands on the left as the village buildings grow closer. The path surface changes from dirt to cobblestone as Geralt continues walking forward.

events.description: enters village center from riverside path, ground returns to dirt
approaches campfire and merchant stall in village center

agents.ego_description: walking through village center passing a peasant woman and approaching a market stall

notable_agents.action: peasant woman in dress walking ahead on the path
merchant standing beside market stall with goods

entered.detail: worn dirt path through village center
weathered wooden directional sign with multiple arrows
canvas canopy over wooden market stall
burning fire pit in village center
cluster of wooden houses with straw roofs

segments.scene_description: Entering the village center, the path returns to dirt as Geralt passes a peasant woman walking ahead. A wooden signpost appears on the left, while a market stall with a canvas canopy and a burning campfire occupy the center. A merchant stands by the stall as the character walks through the populated village area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between wooden houses

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow village paths between closely packed wooden houses

entered.detail: narrow winding path between buildings
dark wooden log cabin walls with small windows
wooden archway entrance between buildings
destination wooden house with thatched roof and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between closely packed wooden log houses, creating an enclosed alleyway. Chickens scatter on the ground as Geralt approaches a wooden gateway. The target cottage with glowing windows becomes visible ahead, marking the destination building.

events.description: enters wooden house from outdoor village, transitioning to interior

agents.ego_description: entering the house through wooden doorway and walking toward the fireplace

entered.detail: heavy wooden door frame marking entrance
interior ceiling showing wooden beams and thatch
stone fireplace with burning fire
rough wooden dining table with benches
dried herbs and flowers hanging from ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the wooden house through a doorway, transitioning from the golden hour exterior to the dimly lit interior. The space features a thatched roof with exposed beams, a stone fireplace with a warm fire, a wooden table, and dried herbs hanging from the ceiling. The character walks toward the fireplace as the camera follows inside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural landscape into the intimate, dimly lit interior of a village cottage. It begins on a dirt path flanked by pine trees and grass fields, following Geralt as he moves toward a distant cluster of thatched-roof buildings. As the terrain shifts, the camera glides along a stone walkway beside a river and a wooden watchtower before the path transitions into a bustling village center filled with market stalls, campfires, and passing peasants. The scene then narrows into an enclosed alleyway of log houses where chickens scatter, leading the character through a wooden gateway toward a cottage with glowing windows. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold of the doorway, shifting from the golden hour light of the exterior to a cozy room featuring exposed beams, hanging herbs, and a warm stone fireplace.
